title: begonia fordii
intro: Begonia fordii, also known as the Goldenglow Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the Begonia genus, native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Begonia fordii include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and easing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Begonia fordii is often used to make teas and tinctures, which can be taken to benefit from its medicinal properties.
